notes: Skydroid is based in Quanzhou, China and primarily makes RC controllers and accessories. The C20 weight is listed as 1.000 kg gross weight on Alibaba (this likely includes packaging; net weight may be lower but could not be confirmed from available sources). At 1000g gross weight, it is borderline for the under-1000g criteria -- the net weight of the gimbal itself may be under 1000g. The zoom is inconsistently listed as 22x and 23x across different sources. Night vision capability comes from a dual-sensor setup with an illumination spotlight rather than true infrared thermal imaging. The C20 is designed to work within the Skydroid ecosystem (H16/H30 controllers). It is marked as meets_criteria=true based on 22x+ optical zoom, likely under 1000g net weight, and price well under $10,000 ($379-$498). However, the weight criterion is marginal if gross weight equals net weight.

The 2-axis gimbal uses gas-filled direct-drive motors with continuous 360-degree rotation. It features an onboard NVIDIA Ampere GPU for edge AI processing. A datasheet PDF exists but detailed specs like dimensions, power consumption, and voltage are not available in public sources. Price is quote-based but positioned as roughly half the cost of competitors.
